title: Report Generator - Reports
description: Tracks generated reports with metadata, executive summaries, and QA notes

Output Path.description: Local file path to the generated report

Executive Summary.description: Condensed key findings from the report

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the report was generated

QA Notes.description: Issues and recommendations flagged by the QA agent

notes: Created lazily by the QA agent on first report generation. Search by title 'Report Generator - Reports' before creating. The QA agent updates Status to 'Complete' or 'Failed' after review.
